cards.back: A probability distribution over a set of variables, where each variable depends on its neighbors in a graph
A statistical model that represents a system with hidden states and observable outcomes, where the system's state at each time step is unknown
An algorithm used to compute the probability of a state sequence in a Hidden Markov Model, given an observation sequence
An algorithm used to find the most likely state sequence in a Hidden Markov Model, given an observation sequence
An algorithm used to estimate the parameters of a Hidden Markov Model, given an observation sequence
